name: Lemon Drops
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Coat two baking sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
Beat the cream cheese, oil, lemon juice, Egg, egg white, lemon rind, and sugar together until smooth.
Add the flour, baking soda, and salt; beat until well combined.
Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter about 2 inches apart onto the baking sheets.
Bake for approximately 10 minutes, or until lightly browned and firm to touch.
Cool on a wire rack. Repeat until all cookies are baked.
Store Lemon Drops in the refrigerator between layers of waxed paper.
